title: Prepworks from Progressive Measuring 2.5 Cup Capacity, 1 Piece, Clear
description:
About this item
This Prepworks by Progressive measuring cup has graduated markings on the Clear cup to make it easier to measure liquids more accurately
Pour confidently with the classic spout and easy grip handle
This cup measures up to 2. 5 cups, 20 oz. Or 600 ml
It also has both standard and metric measurements
This item is dishwasher safe for easy clean up
reviews_5s:
I have finally worn off almost all the print on my 40 year old plastic Wesson oil measuring cup. I hated to let it go after all these years. It was a 2 cup measure and I used it daily so it sat on a corner of my sink. This will sit there too. My old one didn't have a handle so it's nice to have one now. I will have to get used to the new markings but it looks like it will outlive me. It's a very thick plastic telling me it's well made.great measuring cupI avoid using this in the microwave or the dishwasher. I wash it by hand and it has lasted me without any problems or signs of wear.

It's worth the money if you don't treat it like a more expensive glass cup. just take care of it and it'll last you fine.Awesome quality and quick deliveryEasy to read the measurements can work with hot or cold liquid. Will buy again I love it .Nice measuring cup, just what I needed.Very nice measure cup
Five starsThis product is made from a thick, hard, and clear plastic. It's great for verifying the exact amount of whatever is in it and the spout and handle are designed properly. I used it to replace a softer plastic measuring cup that was translucent and much softer plastic. I would buy it again.The thing I like about this measuring cup is I need to add 2 1/2 cups of Coral Marine salt to the 5 gallon container so we can mix salt water for the fish tank. And when I was using the single 1cup metal measuring cup the handle was bending a little and it’s difficult to sit there and have to Measure out 2 1/2 cups and see the level markings on the edges on the inside of the cup. And to do this multiple times on several 5 gallon containers. So, as I said earlier, it is one scoop I can see through the clear measuring cup with its measuring indicators, a whole lot easier. And this will absolutely make it a whole lot faster for us.Measures easily
reviews_1s:
Used 1 time with cold water and it cracked. It’s a crappy quality measuring cup.I warmed up some butter for 40 seconds it got stress crack's all over! I'm 65 yrs old done this 1000s of times. Should have stuck w pyrex!!! Just got it q week ago. I actually got 2 one for my greenhouse as well...It's going back. What a hassle.Let me preface this review with the statement - I am nearly 50 years old and a mostly intelligent, educated person. I have dealt with stickers on products for many years, and have always been successful at removing them. I did not suddenly have a functional lapse that left me clueless on getting rid of a sticker.

The product itself seems well made. However, so were the stickers, beyond belief. (Why are two large stickers needed on this product?)

I was unable to peel them off completely, and couldn't scrape off the residue. I tried washing it by hand, and then in the dishwasher, thinking that might loosen up the glue-like bond. Nope. I then tried soaking it in water. I tried scraping. Rubbing. Sponging. Scrub brushes. Finally I resorted to Goof Off, which gets sticky stuff off of stickier stuff in seconds. It made it worse. The sticky stuff just hardened even more, and some of the red print on the cup rubbed off! I then tried a pot scrubber - the stickiness just laughed at my attempt and the plastic obviously got scratched. It's seriously like these stickers were painted on using super glue. I now have a smeared, scraped, partly numberless, extra sticky measuring cup that wasn't even worth the three bucks I paid for it.

Either this product has some seriously evil sticker glue, or 2020 continues to be a year that is giving me half a peace sign.It looks good, and it was the precise 2.5 cup measurement I wanted. The first one I bought began fracturing after one week, to point where liquid oozed out of cracks in the side. Since it was exactly what I wanted, I assumed it was the result of dishwashing(Top Rack).I bought another one and only hand washed it. After four days the second one began disintegrating after I reheated coffee in the microwave. Looks great, reasonably priced, but strictly suitable only for measuring and pouring "cold" liquids. Very disappointing.This measuring cup is not accurate!Cracks as soon as hot water is poured in. Both pieces reacted the same way.The cup has metric measurement marks, as well as ounces. Easy to read. However, it cracked the first time I put it in the microwave with a cup of water. These were hairline cracks that have worsened over time in the dishwasher and microwave. Very disappointing quality.This came up under a search for a glass measuring cup, it’s plastic. I can’t use it for what I wanted because I can’t use plastic as a double boiler to melt wax. The two stickers others have mentioned are extremely hard to remove and you have to scratch the plastic in order to get them off. On top of everything else, if you pour 2 cups of water from a real Pyrex measuring cup into this cup, it only measures 1 3/4 cups of water; so if you use this for baking you are screwed by adding in too much liquid. I then tried my plastic oxo cups against this cup, again it measured 1 3/4 cups when you pour in 2 cups liquid. DO NOT BUY THIS CUP, IT IS A PIECE OF JUNK. Spend a couple more dollars and get either Pyrex or oxo.One time after putting in the dishwasher this is how it comes out. That was never mentioned to not be doing. Won’t buy this again.I thought this measuring cup would last me many years. Nope! I was making muffins and poured some half and half into it, heard a sound and saw that it has a large crack rendering it useless for liquids.

The cup was not hot, the half and half had been sitting out for a while so it wasn't very cold and the cup was only used about once a week and never abused. Absolutely ridiculous and I'm mad about this. I liked everything about it until now. I will not buy anything from this brand again and will go back to using one I have that is at least 15 years old.
